_comment: TanStack Query v5 rules. Loaded when @tanstack/react-query is detected.

rules.message: cacheTime renamed to gcTime in TanStack Query v5. Use gcTime (garbage collect time) instead.
TanStack Query v5 requires object syntax: useQuery({ queryKey, queryFn }). Positional arguments (string/array as first arg) are removed.
onSuccess/onError/onSettled removed from useQuery in v5. Use React.useEffect(() => fn(data), [data]) for side effects. These callbacks are only valid on useMutation.
onError removed from useQuery in v5. Use the error return value: const { error } = useQuery(...). Callbacks only on useMutation.
